texto: Michael [Hutchence] is hands down one of the greatest frontmen in music. The style, the voice—all of it. Any way that I was ever influenced by him really comes down to small, pale imitations compared to the real thing. There is a fearlessness about him. Watching him at Wembley Stadium with 70,000 people, he looks as comfortable as if he were in his own living room.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lori Majewski: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de enfrentar incertezas com ação. O trecho “Michael [Hutchence] is hands down one of the greatest frontmen in music. The style, the voice—all…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, 80s, 80s-music pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de 80s-music e 80s-nostalgia.

frase_original: Michael [Hutchence] is hands down one of the greatest frontmen in music. The style, the voice—all of it. Any way that I was ever influenced by him really comes down to small, pale imitations compared to the real thing. There is a fearlessness about him. Watching him at Wembley Stadium with 70,000 people, he looks as comfortable as if he were in his own living room.
